title: rubus × longiracemosus
intro: Rubus × longiracemosus, also known as the raspberry rose or raspberry cane, is a hybrid plant species derived from the genus Rubus, characterized by its thorny canes and edible fruit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus × longiracemosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Rubus × longiracemosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
